decks.notes: The main concept of this Modern 1 vs 1 Aggro - Death And Taxes deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan with cards like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push, while efficiently using cards like Flickerwisp and Ephemerate to control the board and protect your own creatures. The deck aims to apply pressure early with aggressive creatures like Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd and Overlord of the Balemurk, while also having access to powerful removal spells like Solitude and Prismatic Ending. The deck also utilizes powerful planeswalkers like Teferi, Time Raveler to further disrupt the opponent's strategy while maintaining board presence.

The deck focuses on utilizing the Amulet of Vigor to ramp up mana quickly to play powerful cards like Primeval Titan and Scapeshift. It also includes land search and recursion cards, as well as additional utility lands to further enhance the combo potential of the deck. The key strategy revolves around creating a large amount of mana and searching for specific lands to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and land-based abilities. By maximizing the efficiency of land plays and utilizing the Amulet of Vigor effectively, the deck aims to quickly overwhelm opponents with powerful combos and threats.

The main focus of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly and aggressively attack the opponent using efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury, supported by burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment. The deck also includes cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory to provide additional support and boosts to the creatures. The mana base is designed to support the aggressive strategy with a mix of fetch lands and dual lands. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of creature aggression and burn damage.

This deck focuses on aggressive play and disrupting your opponent's game plan through taxing effects. It utilizes powerful creatures like Phelia and Ragavan to apply pressure while using cards like Consign to Memory and Galvanic Discharge to control the board. The inclusion of cards like Arena of Glory and Wrath of the Skies provide additional support and removal options. Overall, this deck aims to quickly close out games by overwhelming opponents with a mix of creatures and disruptive spells.

This deck focuses on utilizing a combination of powerful creatures and spells to put pressure on the opponent and quickly bring the game to a close. By playing aggressively and efficiently, it aims to overwhelm the opponent and establish a dominant board presence. With a mix of efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Territorial Kavu, supported by cards like Leyline of the Guildpact and Lightning Bolt, this deck looks to quickly deal damage and secure victory before the opponent can establish their own game plan.

The deck focuses on quickly assembling the Allosaurus Rider combo by utilizing cards like Eldritch Evolution, Neoform, and Glittering Wish to tutor for key pieces. By sacrificing Allosaurus Rider to these spells, players can cheat out powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Ghalta, Stampede Tyrant for massive damage. The deck also includes counterspells like Pact of Negation to protect the combo and cards like Consign to Memory for additional control. Overall, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and efficient combo while controlling the game state with various spells and creatures.

This deck focuses on aggressive plays while disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards that interact with their resources. It aims to quickly establish a board presence with creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd, while using cards like Galvanic Discharge and Prismatic Ending to control the opponent's threats. The deck also utilizes powerful spells like Consign to Memory and Quantum Riddler to disrupt the opponent's strategy, with cards like Teferi, Time Raveler providing additional control and protection. Additionally, the deck includes a variety of lands to ensure consistent mana access for its spells.

The main concept of this UR Control deck is to control the game by disrupting opponents' strategies with a variety of counterspells and removal spells while maintaining card advantage through cantrips and card draw. The deck aims to control the board with efficient removal like Lightning Bolt and Unholy Heat, while protecting its win conditions like Thundertrap Trainer and Flame of Anor. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Sink into Stupor and Subtlety to further disrupt opponents' plans. Overall, the deck seeks to outvalue opponents with card advantage and efficient removal.

This deck focuses on utilizing Amulet of Vigor to untap lands and generate mana in order to play Primeval Titan and other powerful threats quickly. The deck includes multiple land search and ramp cards to help accelerate the deployment of key combo pieces. By utilizing cards like Scapeshift and Urza's Saga, the deck can easily search for important lands and assemble its combo pieces to create a potent board state. The goal of this deck is to quickly ramp and overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats and combo interactions.

This deck focuses on cycling through cards like Street Wraith and Subtlety to quickly fill up the graveyard with creatures. Once there are enough creatures in the graveyard, the player can cast Living End to bring all the creatures back onto the battlefield, potentially overwhelming the opponent with a massive board presence. The deck also includes cards like Force of Negation and Endurance to protect the combo and disrupt the opponent's strategy. It aims to win the game through a powerful synergy between cycling creatures and a well-timed Living End.

The key concept of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. The deck aims to put constant pressure on the opponent using efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, supported by burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment. The deck also includes utility cards like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Seasoned Pyromancer to provide card advantage and board presence. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah serves as a powerful finisher, while Blood Moon can disrupt the opponent's mana base. The deck's strategy is to maintain a fast-paced offense and close out the game before the opponent can stabilize.

The deck focuses on generating mana quickly with rituals and mana-producing spells to cast big spells like Ral, Monsoon Mage and Past in Flames for explosive turns. It utilizes cards like Ruby Medallion and Wrenn's Resolve to reduce the cost of spells and generate additional mana. The deck also includes cards like Reckless Impulse and Desperate Ritual to help draw cards and generate mana. The win condition is typically through a large Grapeshot or a powerful spell loop using Past in Flames. The deck aims to combo off quickly and overwhelm the opponent.

The deck focuses on quickly deploying artifact creatures and utilizing artifacts to maximize efficiency and disrupt opponents. It aims to overwhelm opponents with aggressive plays while also providing disruption through cards like Engineered Explosives and Tormod's Crypt. By utilizing artifact synergies and powerful cards such as Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Urza's Saga, the deck can quickly establish a threatening board presence and apply pressure on opponents. It also includes cards like Pithing Needle and Aether Spellbomb to deal with opposing threats and maintain board control.

The deck focuses on assembling UrzaTron (Urza's Tower, Power Plant, and Mine) to generate a large amount of mana to cast powerful Eldrazi creatures and control spells. The goal is to disrupt the opponent's game plan with cards like Thought-Knot Seer and Ugin, the Eye of the Storms, while also utilizing Karn, the Great Creator to tutor for specific artifacts to deal with different threats. The deck also includes cards like Sire of Seven Deaths and Devourer of Destiny to provide additional threats and close out the game efficiently.

The deck focuses on quickly assembling artifacts on the battlefield to power up cards like Urza's Saga and Mox Opal. It also includes cards like Kappa Cannoneer and Pinnacle Emissary for aggressive plays. The deck also has disruption tools like Tormod's Crypt and Metallic Rebuke to control the game. Emry, Lurker of the Loch can be used to recur artifacts from the graveyard, while Arcbound Ravager and Weapons Manufacturing offer extra synergies with the artifact theme. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with an explosive combination of artifact creatures and spells.

This deck focuses on aggressive plays with a mix of disruptive elements to slow down the opponent. The key is to quickly deploy threats like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury to apply pressure while using cards like Quantum Riddler and Galvanic Discharge to control the board. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Consign to Memory and Solitude for removal and protection, while utilizing cards like Teferi, Time Raveler and Ephemerate for tempo plays. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with fast, efficient creatures and disrupt their game plan to secure a victory.
